report.summary: Built two comprehensive learn guides: DeFi Points & Airdrop Farming Guide 2026 (points meta, anti-Sybil, SEC guidance, farming strategies) and Ethereum Blob Space & Data Availability Economics Guide (EIP-4844, blob fees, PeerDAS, L2 cost reductions, Danksharding roadmap). Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: DeFi Points & Airdrop Farming: 115B+ points distributed by Feb 2024 across protocols. Points meta evolved from Blur (2023) through Blast, EigenLayer ($15B+ TVL via points), to Hyperliquid ($1.6B airdrop). 2026 trends: wallet narratives over random behavior, 85% of new airdrops include anti-Sybil mechanisms, 88% of airdropped tokens lose value within 3 months. SEC-CFTC March 17 2026 guidance clarifies true airdrops without consideration generally don't meet Howey Test. Aerodrome Finance DNS hijacking (Nov 2025) stole $1M+ from farmers.

Ethereum Blob Space Economics: EIP-4844 (Dencun, March 2024) introduced blob transactions reducing L2 data costs 90%+. Arbitrum fees dropped $0.37 to $0.012, Optimism $0.32 to $0.009. Blob utilization at ~40% capacity with fees near minimum 1 wei. PeerDAS (EIP-7594) in Pectra (May 2025) enables nodes to verify availability by downloading only 1/8 of data. Full Danksharding (Fusaka, 2027+) targets 16-32+ blobs per block. March 2026 Ethereum gas fees at sustained 3 gwei lows. Competing DA layers (Celestia, EigenDA, Avail) challenge Ethereum's DA dominance.

sections.title: Content Created
items: DeFi Points & Airdrop Farming Guide 2026 (~3400 words, 556 lines, 8 sections): What are DeFi points, how points programs work, points meta evolution 2023-2026, top farming opportunities, anti-Sybil detection, risks of points farming, SEC regulatory guidance, smart strategies. Includes warning boxes (Points ≠ Guaranteed Tokens, Tax Warning), 6 FAQs, 5 related articles.

Ethereum Blob Space & Data Availability Economics Guide (~3100 words, 473 lines, 8 sections): What is blob space, how EIP-4844 works, blob fee market mechanics, L2 economics impact, PeerDAS (EIP-7594), Danksharding roadmap, implications for users/builders, challenges and open questions. Includes info boxes (Two Fee Markets, Before vs After EIP-4844, L1 Revenue Question), 6 FAQs, 5 related articles.

FAQ schema with 6 questions. Internal links to /learn/crypto-airdrops-2026, /learn/restaking-eigenlayer-guide, /learn/defi-safety-guide-2026, /learn/sec-digital-commodities-classification-guide, /tools/airdrop-tracker.

FAQ schema with 6 questions. Internal links to /learn/layer-2-scaling-guide, /learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide, /learn/data-availability-layer-guide-2026, /learn/modular-blockchain-stack-guide-2026, /tools/gas-tracker.
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts
